creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Aug 09, 2006 at 08:32:31AM +0200, Helge Oldach wrote:
> Ooops, the patch was broken.
> 
> Here's a corrected one that I have tested and it actually works.
> 
Hi Helge,

I just had a quick glance at your patch and it looks similar to the one
included in http://gabor.t-hosting.hu/patches/destdir_fix.diff which is
currently being tested. Can you confirm that that patch works?

Thanks,
-erwin
